title: Step 1: "There She Is!"
overview: Doki, a female rabbit, meets and falls in love with, Nabi, a male cat, in a world where love between the two species is socially unacceptable.

title: Step 2: "Cake Dance"
overview: Nabi carries Doki's birthday cake across various obstacles including a gang of rabbits, the Jjintta Set, who attack him out of Yi-ho's mistaken belief that Nabi forced Doki into the relationship.
